{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2103975?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Kocal", "id": 2103975, "login": "Kocal", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIxMDM5NzU=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49215", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "### Description

When using `symfony/ux-live-component`, methods annotated with `#[LiveAction]` are invokable from the browser and mutate server-side state via AJAX. `Symfony\UX\LiveComponent\EventListener\LiveComponentSubscriber::isLiveComponentRequest()` gated these invocations on the presence of `Accept: application/vnd.live-component+html`, with a code comment stating that this acted as a CSRF protection.

The `Accept` header is a [CORS-safelisted request header](https://fetch.spec.whatwg.org/#cors-safelisted-request-header), so a cross-origin `fetch()` can set it without triggering a preflight. The header therefore provided no CSRF protection. Any `#[LiveAction]` could be forged cross-origin against a victim's session.

In practice the attack is mitigated by `SameSite=Lax` session cookies (Symfony's default), but applications using `SameSite=None`, `credentials: 'include'` with a permissive cookie policy, or that have been pivoted from another same-origin vector remained exposed.

### Resolution

`isLiveComponentRequest()` now additionally requires the request header `X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest`. This header is **not** CORS-safelisted, so the browser issues a preflight `OPTIONS` request for any cross-origin attempt; Symfony does not advertise CORS for LiveComponent endpoints, the preflight fails, and the real request is blocked before it reaches the application. The bundled Stimulus client already sends `X-Requested-With` on every LiveComponent request (`RequestBuilder.ts`), so standard usage is unaffected. Cross-origin callers must add `X-Requested-With` to their CORS `Access-Control-Allow-Headers` allow-list.

The patch for this issue is available [here](https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/aed7493db2b4b7bf1f9c79b33cda544f06904b27) for branch 2.x (and forward-ported to 3.x).

### Credits

Symfony would like to thank Anthropic (via Project Glasswing) for reporting the issue and Hugo Alliaume for providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00179, "percentile": 0.07545}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4m4j-hmqq-3gxm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4m4j-hmqq-3gxm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4m4j-hmqq-3gxm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49215"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/symfony/ux/security/advisories/GHSA-4m4j-hmqq-3gxm", "https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/aed7493db2b4b7bf1f9c79b33cda544f06904b27", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/symfony/ux-live-component/CVE-2026-49215.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4m4j-hmqq-3gxm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/symfony/ux/security-advisories/GHSA-4m4j-hmqq-3gxm", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/symfony/ux", "summary": "symfony/ux-live-component: CSRF Protection Bypass — Accept Header is CORS-Safelisted", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4m4j-hmqq-3gxm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.36.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.22.0, < 2.36.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: symfony/ux-live-component: CSRF Protection Bypass — Accept Header is CORS-Safelisted
